creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 188457
PowerDNS Recursor: Update to 4.0.7

Notable changes:
- Fix securtity issues CVE-2017-15090, CVE-2017-15092, CVE-2017-15093 and CVE-2017-15094
- Drop support for Botan 1.10 in favor of Botan 2.x.
- Backported bugfixes/improvements from the 4.1.x branch

Full changelog: https://doc.powerdns.com/recursor/changelog/4.0.html#powerdns-recursor-4-0-7
